approvals.summary: Lagoon SOPs draft (4 procedures) -- AI-generated, never reviewed
approvals.content:
AI agents drafted 4 Lagoon SOPs on Mar 8 during your Sirewall trip: Vehicle Checkout, Vehicle Return, Damage Reporting, WhatsApp Inquiry. File: memory/02_projects/lagoon-sops-draft.md

These were reported as 'in progress' in the TI but you never reviewed them. Need your sign-off or rejection before they count as real progress.

approvals.summary: March 14 TI Report -- review commitments & 5CF scores
approvals.content:
Full monthly planning TI at memory/01_daily/2026-03-14-TI-report.md. Contains: executive summary, per-business waterfall, 30-day goal review, 5 Core Function scores, new commitments for remaining 2 weeks, resource allocation recommendations.

Key items needing your sign-off:
- Time allocation shift (OFM from 25% to 50%)
- Daily non-negotiables structure
- Week of March 17-21 commitments
- Delegation moves (Kat, Vex, Rex ownership)

approvals.summary: Lagoon delegation audit -- AI-drafted task list for Dubi handoff
approvals.content: File: memory/02_projects/lagoon-delegation-audit.md. Lists all Lagoon recurring tasks currently requiring Beno and proposes delegation to Dubi. Needs your review to confirm accuracy before acting on it.

approvals.summary: Lagoon ATV rental agreement -- AI-drafted legal template
approvals.content: File: memory/02_projects/lagoon-atv-rental-agreement.md. Rental agreement template for Lagoon Company. AI-generated, needs your legal review before use with customers.
File: memory/02_projects/hr-offer-letter.md. Generic offer letter template. Needs review before sending to any hire (chatters, VA, etc).

approvals.summary: Connect Stripe to Systeme.io -- BLOCKED on Beno action (15 min)
approvals.content: Power Independence Academy is fully built but generating zero revenue because Stripe isn't connected to Systeme.io. This is a 15-minute task that only you can do (requires Stripe login). Highest leverage action on the board right now.

approvals.summary: OFM AI character concept decision -- blocks entire content pipeline
approvals.content:
Need creative direction decision: niche, visual concept, name, viral angle for first AI model. This single decision blocks: LoRA training, content generation, Fanvue setup, IG account aesthetic, chatter briefing. Everything downstream is waiting on this.

See existing concepts at: memory/02_projects/ofm-ai-model-concepts.md

approvals.summary: Condominio fine dispute letter -- needs review before sending
approvals.content: Task from Aitable (status: Review). Dispute letter for condominium fine. Needs your review and approval before it gets sent.

_schema.agent: string - agent name (e.g. Piia, Mara, Kat)
_schema.type: string - content type (e.g. social_post, ad_copy, report, deployment, goal)
_schema.summary: string - short description of what's being approved
_schema.timestamp: ISO8601 - when the approval was created
_schema.topic_id: number - Telegram topic ID where approval was posted
_schema.reason: string - rejection reason or revision notes (filled after action)
_schema.resolved_at: ISO8601 - when the approval was actioned
